definition: We weren’t successful. / We were unsuccessful.

thai: (ใน)สมัยนั้น

thai: บนโลกใบนี้
definition: in this world / on Earth / on this planet

definition: How far have you gotten? / Where are you (now)? //How’s it going? (asked about one’s progress)
